nasb.text: But ten men who were found among them said to Ishmael, “Do not put us to death; for we have stores of wheat, barley, oil and honey hidden in the field.” So he refrained and did not put them to death along with their companions.

esv.text: But there were ten men among them who said to Ishmael, “Do not put us to death, for we have stores of wheat, barley, oil, and honey hidden in the fields.” So he refrained and did not put them to death with their companions.

cnv.text: 只是他們中間有十個人卻對以實瑪利說：“請不要殺死我們！因為我們有許多小麥、大麥、油和蜜，埋藏在田間。”他就住了手，沒有把這十個人在他們的兄弟中一同殺死。

ccb.text: 其中有十个人对以实玛利说：“请不要杀我们，我们在田野里藏了许多大麦、小麦、油和蜜。”他就没有杀他们。
